headline: Is Amazon’s New End to End Supply Chain Services Platform Altering The Investment Case For Amazon.com (AMZN)?
summary: In early May 2026, Amazon launched Amazon Supply Chain Services, opening its freight, distribution, fulfillment, and parcel delivery network to external businesses across sectors including healthcare, automotive, manufacturing, and retail, with early customers such as Procter & Gamble, 3M, Lands’ End, and American Eagle Outfitters. This move extends logistics capabilities first built for Amazon’s own operations into a standalone third-party offering, directly challenging incumbents like UPS...

headline: Deodorant for Stress Sweat: Secret Deodorant Partners with Intern Queen and Creator Corporate Natalie to Help Early-Career Professionals Stay Fresh and Dry
summary: CINCINNATI, May 06, 2026--Secret, the #1 Clinical Antiperspirant Brand* has teamed up with Intern Queen, the leading Gen-Z and campus marketing platform, and Corporate Natalie, content creator and entrepreneur, to provide young women with the tools – and the confidence – to navigate the often sweat-inducing, "unwritten rules" of the corporate world.

headline: Native Launches Limited Edition Boba Cafe Collection Designed to Turn Daily Routines into Delightful Rituals Exclusively at Walmart

headline: Pantene Sunkiss Glow Launch Puts Procter & Gamble Valuation In Focus
summary: Pantene, a Procter & Gamble brand, has launched Sunkiss Glow, a new leave in hair protection spray tailored for summer use. The product targets damage from sun, salt, and chlorine using a Pro Vitamin Complex with niacinamide, biotin, and vitamin E. The launch adds a seasonal, outdoor focused option to Pantene's hair care lineup and is part of Procter & Gamble's broader product development pipeline. For investors tracking Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG), the Sunkiss Glow launch sits against a...
